title: Contribute to the development of cultural safety processes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contribute to the development of cultural safety processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to survey cultural safety processes within organisation

pcs.text: Investigate and record existing and past cultural safety policy in the organisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record existing and past cultural safety policy in the organisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record existing and past cultural safety policy in the organisation.

pcs.text: Assist in preparing a survey to investigate current cultural climate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist in preparing a survey to investigate current cultural climate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist in preparing a survey to investigate current cultural climate.

pcs.text: Confirm survey methods are appropriate with management and with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Cultural Authority
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm survey methods are appropriate with management and with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Cultural Authority?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm survey methods are appropriate with management and with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Cultural Authority.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to survey cultural safety processes within organisation

elements.title: Conduct cultural safety awareness survey

pcs.text: Canvass management and staff through approved survey
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Canvass management and staff through approved survey?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Canvass management and staff through approved survey.

pcs.text: Ensure process is outlined to participants, and permissions given to document responses
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure process is outlined to participants, and permissions given to document responses?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure process is outlined to participants, and permissions given to document responses.

pcs.text: Document responses and report outcomes to management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document responses and report outcomes to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document responses and report outcomes to management.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct cultural safety awareness survey

elements.title: Support the development and implementation of the cultural safety process

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse documented responses to survey?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse documented responses to survey.

pcs.text: Assist in developing the process according to standard workplace formats and management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist in developing the process according to standard workplace formats and management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist in developing the process according to standard workplace formats and management.

pcs.text: Gain approvals from management and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People to implement process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Gain approvals from management and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People to implement process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Gain approvals from management and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People to implement process.

pcs.text: Promote the newly developed process to all members of the organisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Promote the newly developed process to all members of the organisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Promote the newly developed process to all members of the organisation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Support the development and implementation of the cultural safety process

elements.title: Evaluate effectiveness of cultural safety process

pcs.text: Assist in preparing follow-up questions and conduct surveys to gauge effectiveness of new processes after an agreed, appropriate timeframe
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist in preparing follow-up questions and conduct surveys to gauge effectiveness of new processes after an agreed, appropriate timeframe?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist in preparing follow-up questions and conduct surveys to gauge effectiveness of new processes after an agreed, appropriate timeframe.

pcs.text: Compare and document newly implemented processes to past established processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare and document newly implemented processes to past established processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare and document newly implemented processes to past established processes.

pcs.text: Revise processes according to responses received
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Revise processes according to responses received?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Revise processes according to responses received.

pcs.text: Report final outcome of revised processes to management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report final outcome of revised processes to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report final outcome of revised processes to management.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Evaluate effectiveness of cultural safety process

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
